etymology.description: 而(而) (ér, 'and') as phonetic component → 而(耳) stylization → final form 耏
etymology.interpretation: The character 耏 uses the 而(而) (ér, 'and') component for its phonetic value, while the stylization into 耏 reflects its specific usage related to 'beard'. The character is not commonly used and serves mainly as a variant form.
